steps.title: Read follow their ways
steps.content: Andrew decides not to go with his brothers. In that context, not wanting to "follow their ways" means not wanting to copy or adopt their behavior.

steps.title: Reject unrelated verbs
steps.content: Choice A means defend or explain, Choice C means refer to verbally, and Choice D means bring back. None describes copying the brothers' way of living. The remaining option means imitate. The answer is B.
